## ₿ Bitcoin

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Current Price** | ~$77,400 |
| **7-Day High** | $80,120 (May 15) |
| **7-Day Change** | 🔴 ~-3.4% |
| **Fear & Greed Index** | 31 — 😨 **Fear** |
| **Weekly Trend** | ↘️ Briefly hit 50 (Neutral, May 6) → back to 31 (Fear, May 16) |

**News & Market Sentiment:**
- 📉 BTC slipped from $80,120 (May 15) to ~$77,347 (May 18) — down ~3.4% in 4 days
- 🌍 **U.S.-Iran tensions**, hot inflation data, and leveraged long liquidations are the key pressure points
- ⚖️ **CLARITY Act** passage is a positive long-term signal for crypto regulation *(Yahoo Finance)*
- 😱 **Retail sentiment:** Cautious — social media negative, keyword search interest low
- 📊 **Context:** April suffered 47+ consecutive days of **Extreme Fear (score: 11)** — longest since FTX collapse in Nov 2022. Recovery to Neutral was fleeting; Fear has returned

```
Fear & Greed Weekly Trend:
Apr →  11 (Extreme Fear) ─────────────────────┐
May 6 → 50 (Neutral)     ──────────┐           │
May 16 → 31 (Fear)        ────────────────────-┘
Direction: ↘️ Deteriorating
```

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- 🟣 **Claude for Small Business:** Anthropic launched prebuilt agentic workflows inside QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace & Microsoft 365 — handling payroll, invoicing, and contract routing *(TechCrunch)*
- ⚖️ **Claude for Legal:** New law-focused MCP connectors expand Anthropic's legal AI offering with practice-area specific plug-ins *(TechCrunch)*
- 🚀 **NASA Mars:** Perseverance rover completed first-ever **AI-planned Mars drives** using Claude vision-language models — replacing 28 years of manual human planning *(Anthropic)*
- 💰 **Anthropic Funding:** $200M partnership with the **Gates Foundation** + $1.5B JV with Blackstone, Goldman Sachs, Apollo, General Atlantic & Hellman & Friedman *(PYMNTS)*
- 🔮 **Project Glasswing:** AWS, Apple, Cisco, Google, JPMorgan & Microsoft get exclusive early access to **Claude Mythos Preview**, Anthropic's unreleased frontier model *(Anthropic)*

---

## 🔬 Health & Science

- 🧫 **Fasting Science:** Major internal physiological transformation only kicks in after **~3 full days** of fasting — new research maps the timeline *(ScienceDaily)*
- 🧠 **Alzheimer's Breakthrough:** Nanotechnology treatment **reverses symptoms in mice** — engineered nanoparticles clear amyloid proteins and repair the blood-brain barrier *(UCSF)*
- 🩸 **Depression Blood Test:** Depression may soon be detectable via a simple blood test tracking how immune cells age — potential game-changer for diagnosis *(Scientific American)*
- 💊 **Multivitamin & Aging:** Daily multivitamin shown to **slow biological aging** in large clinical trial of older adults *(Live Science)*
- 🧬 **CRISPR Milestone:** First fully **personalized CRISPR gene therapy** administered to a 6-year-old child, dramatically reducing medication dependency *(Mass General Brigham)*
